headline: Adobe (ADBE) Opens Its AI Tools For Free And Expands Into Commerce Media
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) is shifting to a freemium AI model across its creative tools, opening up access to more users. The company is rolling out creative AI agents within Firefly, Creative Cloud, Photoshop and Premiere to support content workflows. Adobe has launched Brand Visibility and GenStudio for Commerce Media Networks to address AI driven brand and commerce use cases. Adobe sits at the center of creative and marketing software, and its move into freemium AI comes as generative tools...
